title: Topaz Enhance Image
description:
Topaz Image API — Precision Upscale / Enhance.

    topaz, image, upscale, enhance, restore

    Multipart POST /image/v1/enhance/async with Topaz precision models (Standard V2, High Fidelity V2, Low Resolution V2, CGI, Text Refine). Supports face enhancement, sharpening, denoising, compression repair, and subject-targeted application. Any model-specific parameters that are not supported by the chosen model are ignored by the API.

fields.name: image
fields.title: Image
fields.description: Source image to enhance. Supported formats: jpeg, png, tiff.

fields.name: model
fields.title: Model
fields.description: Topaz precision image model.

fields.name: output_width
fields.title: Output Width
fields.description: Output width in pixels (1-32000). 0 leaves height to drive proportional scaling.

fields.name: output_height
fields.title: Output Height
fields.description: Output height in pixels (1-32000). 0 leaves width to drive proportional scaling.

fields.name: output_format
fields.title: Output Format
fields.description: Encoded format of the returned image.

fields.name: crop_to_fill
fields.title: Crop To Fill
fields.description: Crop instead of letterbox when the output aspect differs from the source.

fields.name: face_enhancement
fields.title: Face Enhancement
fields.description: Enable face recovery pass.

fields.name: face_enhancement_strength
fields.title: Face Enhancement Strength
fields.description: Intensity of face recovery (0 = off, 1 = strongest). Required when face_enhancement=true.

fields.name: face_enhancement_creativity
fields.title: Face Enhancement Creativity
fields.description: Realistic (0) ↔ creative (1) face recovery. Required when face_enhancement=true.

fields.name: sharpen
fields.title: Sharpen
fields.description: Sharpening strength (0-1).

fields.name: denoise
fields.title: Denoise
fields.description: Noise reduction strength (0-1).

fields.name: fix_compression
fields.title: Fix Compression
fields.description: Reduce JPEG/compression artifacts (0-1).

fields.name: strength
fields.title: Strength
fields.description: Overall model strength (0.01-1). Too high can look unrealistic.

fields.name: subject_detection
fields.title: Subject Detection
fields.description: Restrict enhancements to a subject region.

title: Topaz Enhance Image (Generative)
description:
Topaz Image API — Generative Upscale (Wonder / Bloom / Redefine).

    topaz, image, generative, upscale, prompt

    Multipart POST /image/v1/enhance-gen/async. Prompt-guided enhancement with creativity, texture, detail, and face recovery controls. Parameters not supported by the chosen model are ignored.

fields.name: image
fields.title: Image
fields.description: Source image to enhance.

fields.name: model
fields.title: Model
fields.description: Topaz generative model.

fields.name: prompt
fields.title: Prompt
fields.description: Description of the desired enhancement (max 1024 chars). Ignored when autoprompt=true.

fields.name: autoprompt
fields.title: Auto Prompt
fields.description: Let Topaz auto-generate a prompt from the image.

fields.name: creativity
fields.title: Creativity
fields.description: Creative liberty level (1-9). Low = high fidelity; high = more creative.

fields.name: texture
fields.title: Texture
fields.description: Texture addition amount (1-5).

fields.name: output_width
fields.title: Output Width
fields.description: Output width in pixels (1-32000). 0 leaves height to drive scaling.

fields.name: output_height
fields.title: Output Height
fields.description: Output height in pixels (1-32000). 0 leaves width to drive scaling.

fields.name: crop_to_fill
fields.title: Crop To Fill
fields.description: Crop instead of letterbox when the output aspect differs from the source.

fields.name: detail
fields.title: Add Detail
fields.description: Add a detail pass after the primary render.

fields.name: detail_strength
fields.title: Detail Strength
fields.description: Strength of the detail pass (0-10). Required when detail=true.

title: Topaz Enhance Video
description:
Topaz Video API — upscale / enhance pipeline.

    topaz, video, upscale, enhance, restore

    POST /video/ → PATCH /video/{id}/accept → multipart PUT upload → PATCH /video/{id}/complete-upload/ → GET /video/{id}/status. Requires source metadata (resolution, frame rate, duration, frame count), probed locally via ffprobe.

fields.name: video
fields.title: Video
fields.description: Source video to enhance. mp4, mov, or mkv.

fields.name: model
fields.title: Model
fields.description: Topaz video upscale / enhancement model. Frame interpolation models live on the Interpolate Video node.

fields.name: video_type
fields.title: Video Type
fields.description: Frame/field type of the source.

fields.name: auto
fields.title: Parameter Mode
fields.description: Auto = automatic estimation. Manual = use the values below. Relative = auto + manual offsets.

fields.name: output_width
fields.title: Output Width
fields.description: 0 = same as source.

fields.name: output_height
fields.title: Output Height
fields.description: 0 = same as source.

fields.name: output_frame_rate
fields.title: Output Frame Rate
fields.description: 0 = same as source.

fields.name: dynamic_compression_level
fields.title: Compression Level
fields.description: Automatic CQP selection. Use videoBitrate-style overrides via the API directly if you need a fixed bitrate.

fields.name: audio_mode
fields.title: Audio
fields.description: copy = keep source audio. aac/ac3/pcm = re-encode. none = drop audio.

fields.name: crop_to_fit
fields.title: Crop To Fit
fields.description: Center-crop to the output dimensions instead of letterboxing.

fields.name: compression
fields.title: Compression Recovery
fields.description: Strength of compression recovery (-1 to 1). Used when Parameter Mode is Manual/Relative.

fields.name: details
fields.title: Details
fields.description: Detail reconstruction (-1 to 1).

fields.name: noise
fields.title: Noise Reduction
fields.description: Noise reduction (-1 to 1).

fields.name: halo
fields.title: Halo Reduction
fields.description: Halo reduction (-1 to 1).

fields.name: blur
fields.title: Sharpness
fields.description: Sharpness applied to the result (-1 to 1).

fields.name: recover_original_detail
fields.title: Recover Original Detail
fields.description: Reintroduce source detail into the output (0 to 1).

title: Topaz Interpolate Video
description:
Topaz Video API — frame interpolation pipeline.

    topaz, video, interpolate, slowmo, fps

    Same multi-step pipeline as Enhance Video but with a Frame Interpolation filter. Use Apollo (apo-8) for general slow-motion or fps boosts, Chronos (chr-2 / chf-3) for higher-motion content, Aperture Flow (apf-2) as a lightweight default, and Aion (aion-1) for high-resolution / complex motion.

fields.name: video
fields.title: Video
fields.description: Source video to interpolate.

fields.name: model
fields.title: Model
fields.description: Frame interpolation model.

fields.name: slowmo
fields.title: Slow-mo Factor
fields.description: 1.0 = no slow motion. >1 stretches duration (1-16).

fields.name: fps
fields.title: Output FPS
fields.description: 0 = same as source. Otherwise 15-240. Does not change duration.

fields.name: duplicate
fields.title: Drop Duplicates
fields.description: Analyze input for duplicate frames and remove them before interpolation.

fields.name: duplicate_threshold
fields.title: Duplicate Threshold
fields.description: Detection sensitivity for duplicates (0.001-0.1).

fields.name: output_width
fields.title: Output Width
fields.description: 0 = same as source.

fields.name: output_height
fields.title: Output Height
fields.description: 0 = same as source.

fields.name: audio_mode
fields.title: Audio
fields.description: copy = keep source audio. aac/ac3/pcm = re-encode. none = drop audio.
